perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a graphic designed like a school exam paper titled 'Eye Test'; a circular window shows a stylized painting of a vast green field with three tiny figures in the distance. (2) The visual cuts to a closer view of the field, revealing three people standing in front of a small red-roofed house. (3) The final phase shows the actual people: a woman on the left in a white outfit pointing upward with a smile, and two men on the right wearing eyeglasses and posing confidently for the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Playful, upbeat electronic music starts with a light and inquisitive tempo. (2) A female voice speaks in a friendly, high-pitched tone, acting as a narrator for the quiz. (3) A 'ding' sound effect rings out as the text reveals the answer, followed by a short, energetic musical resolution.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '眼力大考驗' (Eye Test) and '寶島眼鏡' (Formosa Optical). (2) Hook Text: '問：圖中的寶島眼鏡 2025 雙代言人是？' (Question: Who are the 2025 dual brand ambassadors for Formosa Optical?). (3) Decorative Text: '再靠近一點點~' (A little closer~) appears during the zoom. (4) Functional Text: '解：就是動力火車和美食水水千千' (Answer: It is Power Station and Foodie Water Water Qian Qian) and '你答對了嗎？' (Did you get it right?).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro Hook -> Progressive Visual Reveal -> Brand Ambassador Reveal

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator (Qian Qian) and 2 male musicians (Power Station band members)
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman in a white sleeveless jumpsuit and two men wearing professional eyeglasses and light-colored suits.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A digital painting of an endless green agricultural field with neat rows under a bright blue sky, featuring a small house with a red roof.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cut sync with visual zoom

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional reveal for Formosa Optical's 2025 brand ambassadors. By using an interactive 'Eye Test' format, it engages the audience to guess who the small figures are, eventually revealing the popular influencers and musicians, thereby associating the brand with these celebrities in a playful and memorable way.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct naming of the brand 'Formosa Optical' and the reveal of official 2025 ambassadors.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: School exam paper layout for visual framing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets a Taiwanese audience familiar with the band Power Station and the foodie influencer Qian Qian.
